'''chalushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deactualization|deactualization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deactualization|deactualization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chalushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chælishith|chælishith]] || [[word:chælishij|chælishij]] || [[word:chælishish|chælishish]] || [[word:chælishi|chælishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalulushuth|chalulushuth]] || [[word:chalulushuj|chalulushuj]] || [[word:chalulushush|chalulushush]] || [[word:chalulushu|chalulushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalushuth|chalushuth]] || [[word:chalushuj|chalushuj]] || [[word:chalushush|chalushush]] || [[word:chalushu|chalushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalufshuth|chalufshuth]] || [[word:chalufshuj|chalufshuj]] || [[word:chalufshush|chalufshush]] || [[word:chalufshuf|chalufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chalushuthu|chalushuthu]] || [[word:chalushuju|chalushuju]] || [[word:chalushushu|chalushushu]] || [[word:chalushuku|chalushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chalushuth|chalushuth]] || [[word:chalushuj|chalushuj]] || [[word:chalushush|chalushush]] || [[word:chalushu|chalushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chalushuthul|chalushuthul]] || [[word:chalushujul|chalushujul]] || [[word:chalushushul|chalushushul]] || [[word:chalushukul|chalushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chalushuthuthu|chalushuthuthu]] || [[word:chalushujuju|chalushujuju]] || [[word:chalushushushu|chalushushushu]] || [[word:chalushuku|chalushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chalushuthun|chalushuthun]] || [[word:chalushujun|chalushujun]] || [[word:chalushushun|chalushushun]] || [[word:chalushukun|chalushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chalushuthuoro|chalushuthuoro]] || [[word:chalushujuoro|chalushujuoro]] || [[word:chalushushuoro|chalushushuoro]] || [[word:chalushukuoro|chalushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
